certificate.caveat: When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11.1 of the Security Policy. No operator authentication is enforced for executing security services that were unlocked by an authenticated service
certificate.description: The IBM(R) NVMe FlashCore(TM) Module2 is a NVMe-connected self-encrypting non-volatile storage module.

sections.title: Establishing approved mode and exit conditions

services.name: FIPSmode?
services.output: Operation status with identify controller response

services.name: FIPScode?
services.output: Operation status with identify controller response

services.name: Get Version
services.output: Operation status with identify controller response

services.name: Board report
services.output: Operation status with board report data

services.name: Set PIN
services.roles: Drive Owner, AdminS P Admin1 , Locking SP Admin1 - 4/Locki ngSP User2
services.cspsAccessed: SID PIN; LockingSP Admin1-4 PINs; AdminSP Admin1 PIN; LockingSP User2 PIN; KEK; LBA Range Root Key

services.name: Firmwar e load
services.description: Load firmware image. If the downloaded firmware image signature checks, then the FCM2 will boot to the new code at next reboot.
services.indicator: New code boots on boot following firmware load

services.name: Set Geometr y
services.description: Set the starting LBA and size of the SLR.

services.name: Lock / Unlock SLR for Rd/Wr
services.description: Block or allow read (decrypt) / write (encrypt) of user data in a range.
services.cspsAccessed: LockingSP User2 PIN; KEK; LBA Range Root Key
services.approvedFunctions: AES-KW; SHA- 256; AES-KW (No Security Claimed ); KDF;

services.name: Read / Write
services.description: to/from a SLR. Access control to this service is provided through Lock/Unlock SLR for Rd/Wr
services.approvedFunctions: Decrypti on/ Encrypti on (Symme tric Key)

services.name: Crypto- Erase of SLR
services.description: Erase user data in a SUM Locking range by changing its associated MEK
services.cspsAccessed: LockingSP Admin1-4 PINs; LockingSP User2 PIN; KEK; LBA Range Root Key; LBA Range MEKs; DRBG EI; DRBG Seed; DRBG C; DRBG V;
services.approvedFunctions: DRBG Symmet ric Key; AES-KW; SHA-256

services.name: Revert via OFS
services.description: Exit approved mode. Note: FCM2 will enter non- compliant state.
services.cspsAccessed: SID PIN; LockingSP Admin1-4 PINs; AdminSP Admin1 PIN; LockingSP User2 PIN; KEK; LBA Range Root Key; LBA Range MEKs; RSA private key; RSA public key; DRBG EI; DRBG Seed; DRBG C; DRBG V;
services.approvedFunctions: DRBG Symmet ric Key; AES-KW; SHA-256
services.indicator: TCG LockingSPObj.Revert(), TCG AdminSPObj.Revert() returns GOOD

services.name: Power On
services.description: Firmware integrity check on boot (Pre- operational self-test)
services.cspsAccessed: FW Verification Key; RSA private key; RSA public key; KEK; DRBG EI; DRBG Seed; DRBG C; DRBG V;
services.approvedFunctions: RSA SigVer; Generat e RSA key-pair
services.indicator: Cold-Boot or Power-On- Reset and drive boots up

services.name: FIPSmod e?
services.description: Reports whether, from a drive perspective, the drive is in approved mode
services.indicator: NVMe Identify: Controller Identify, bytes 3600-3607 (set to “FIPSmode”)

services.name: FIPScode ?
services.description: Reports whether the code level in operation was FIPS validated
services.indicator: NVMe Identify: Controller Identify, bytes 3616-3623 (set to “FIPScode”)

services.name: DRBG Generate Bytes
services.description: Returns a SP800- 90Arev1 DRBG Random Number of # of bytes requested up to 50
services.cspsAccessed: DRBG Seed; DRBG C; DRBG V;

services.name: KEK setup
services.cspsAccessed: KEK; RSA private key; RSA public key
services.approvedFunctions: KTS- OAEP- basic respond er with SHA2- 256
services.indicator: TCG kek setup() method returns GOOD

services.name: Board report
services.indicator: Board report trigger and dump commands return GOOD

services.name: Revert via OFS
services.roleAccess: These PINs are setup or changed by the correspondin g users

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: A primitive used by XTS-AES-256 Encrypt, and by AES key wrap & unwrap

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: It’s used in the context of TCG authentication

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: Store the encryption key in ciphertext mode
